resolution_rule: Choose profile by hardware budget and image size: low for maximum compatibility, mid/normal for consumer GPUs and 768-class images, high for fast 512-class warm runs when the process can hold about 15 GB.
remaining_uncertainty: High mode failed the first 768x768 headroom check, so larger Krea2 images should use mid/group offload or a future split/quantized loader until more memory-saving work lands.
